name: Relativity
domain: Lorentz invariance, equivalence principle, frame covariance, observer independence
core_insight: The laws of physics are identical in all inertial frames; the speed of light is constant everywhere. Gravity and acceleration are locally indistinguishable. Physical laws must be written in covariant form — independent of the choice of coordinate system.

key_equations.name: Lorentz Invariance
key_equations.why: The spacetime interval is the same for all inertial observers — the only observer-independent quantity

key_equations.name: Equivalence Principle
key_equations.why: Gravity and inertia are locally identical — the foundational insight of general relativity

key_equations.name: Light Speed Constancy
key_equations.why: The postulate that forces spacetime to warp: neither space nor time is absolute, only their combination

seed_prompt: ⊗ Change the frame. Does the physics change? It should not. Find the invariant interval.

fourth_equation.name: General Covariance
fourth_equation.formula: Physical laws same in all coordinate systems
fourth_equation.why: The demand that physics be independent of coordinate choice is what forces us to write equations as tensor equations — general covariance is the deepest formulation of frame-independence

explore_paths.question: What does frame-independence imply about the nature of reality?
explore_paths.why: Lorentz invariance is a symmetry of spacetime — P03 is a specific instance of P01 applied to the transformations between inertial frames

explore_paths.question: How does the equivalence principle lead to curved spacetime?
explore_paths.why: The equivalence principle is the seed from which all of general relativity grows — P03 is the conceptual entry point to F18

explore_paths.question: Does relativity of simultaneity have implications for causality and free will?
explore_paths.why: If the future is 'already there' in some frames, then the flow of time and causality are frame-dependent — P03 puts P07 (continuity, flow) under pressure

explore_paths.question: Is there a preferred frame after all?
explore_paths.why: Cosmic microwave background defines a preferred cosmic rest frame — statistically, if not dynamically; the tension between P03 and this observational fact is interesting

open_questions.question: Does quantum gravity require a preferred reference frame, breaking Lorentz invariance?
open_questions.tension: Special relativity insists no frame is preferred. But loop quantum gravity and some quantum gravity models predict Lorentz invariance violation at the Planck scale — the discrete structure of spacetime might break the exact symmetry. Observational tests via gamma-ray bursts (measuring photon speed at different energies) have found no violation — constraining but not ruling out Planck-scale effects.
open_questions.curiosity_hook: If Lorentz invariance breaks at Planck scale, then the most fundamental symmetry in physics is approximate. Every 'fundamental' principle in physics has turned out to be approximate at some scale — is P03 next?

open_questions.question: What is the correct interpretation of the block universe implied by special relativity?
open_questions.tension: The relativity of simultaneity in SR implies that events in one person's future are simultaneous (in the present) for someone in relative motion. The 'block universe' (eternalism) follows: all moments exist equally. Presentists argue this is a misreading. The Rietdijk-Putnam argument makes the block universe seem logically necessary from SR. The implications for free will, causality, and the nature of time are profound.
open_questions.curiosity_hook: P03 has a direct implication: if SR is right, the future is already there. This makes time not a river but a map — a philosophical conclusion from a physical equation. The debate has never been resolved.

open_questions.question: Is the equivalence principle exact, or do quantum mechanics effects violate it?
open_questions.tension: The weak equivalence principle (all objects fall the same way) has been tested to extraordinary precision. The strong equivalence principle (physics in a free-fall frame is identical to SR) is harder to test. Quantum mechanics predicts tiny violations: the COW experiment showed neutron interferometry depends on height in a gravitational field in a way that violates naive equivalence. The quantum equivalence principle remains an open research area.
open_questions.curiosity_hook: The equivalence principle is Einstein's most beautiful idea. If quantum mechanics violates it — even slightly — it creates a crack between the two pillars of modern physics that no one has successfully bridged.

cross_domain_bridges.manifestation: GPS is the most precise engineering test of P03 — relativistic corrections are required to maintain centimeter accuracy
cross_domain_bridges.example: A GPS receiver that ignored special and general relativistic effects would drift ~10 km per day — relativity is not abstract; it is in every smartphone

cross_domain_bridges.manifestation: P03 forces a rethinking of presentism vs eternalism — the metaphysics of time is constrained by special relativity
cross_domain_bridges.example: Philosophers of physics have largely abandoned presentism because it is incompatible with Lorentz invariance

cross_domain_bridges.manifestation: Massive objects bend light; gravitational lensing is P03's observational signature — first confirmed in 1919 eclipse
cross_domain_bridges.example: Einstein rings and gravitational mirages are direct images of P03; massive clusters are used as natural telescopes

cross_domain_bridges.manifestation: E = mc² is an engineering equation: nuclear reactors and weapons convert mass to energy; particle accelerators convert kinetic energy to mass
cross_domain_bridges.example: Pair production (γ → e⁺ + e⁻) converts photon energy directly to particle mass — P03 in a detector

noise_signature.pattern: Superluminal apparent motion of radio jets from quasars
noise_signature.diagnosis: Not actual faster-than-light travel — a relativistic projection effect; jets moving at ~0.99c aimed toward observer create apparent superluminal motion

noise_signature.pattern: Twin paradox confusion — both twins cannot be older
noise_signature.diagnosis: The asymmetry is resolved by recognizing which twin underwent acceleration (changed frames) — the traveling twin is younger; P03 does not produce a paradox when applied correctly

noise_signature.pattern: Coordinate singularity vs physical singularity in GR
noise_signature.diagnosis: Some singularities in GR (e.g., at event horizon in Schwarzschild coordinates) are artifacts of coordinate choice; covariant analysis distinguishes these from real curvature singularities
